About Services Community Contact
Community

You're not alone in this.

The Women's AI Leadership Circle is a small group of women executives who meet monthly to share what they're learning, what they're struggling with, and what's actually working.

🤝

Peer Support

Connect with women who understand the unique challenges you face. No explaining, no justifying. Just support.

📚

Shared Learning

Access to tools, frameworks, and resources I've built over 25 years at Intel, Microsoft, and the DoD.

🎯

Direct Access

Monthly group sessions plus direct access to me between meetings. Not an assistant. Me.

What Members Say

Real women, real results. No paid testimonials. No PR spin.

"The Circle gave me confidence to bring AI strategy to my board. Lakecia's frameworks made it tangible, not theoretical."

Sarah K.
CFO, Mid-Size Tech Company

"I was overwhelmed by AI vendor pitches. Lakecia helped me cut through the noise and focus on what actually moves our business."

Michelle R.
VP Operations, Fortune 500

"Being in a room with other women leaders navigating the same challenges was worth the investment alone."

Angela T.
CEO, Healthcare Startup

"Lakecia doesn't just teach AI. She teaches you how to lead with it. That's the difference."

Diana L.
Board Director, Financial Services

Ready to join the Circle?

Applications open quarterly. 8-12 women per cohort. Apply now for the next session.
